Game.Name: Jikkyou World Soccer - Perfect Eleven (Japan)
Game.plot: International Superstar Soccer is a Sports game, developed and published by Konami,which was released in Japan in 1994.Cheat: CodesThe 2 codes will last until you turn off the SNES (you can reset it and the codes still will be working).Cheat: Special GameReach the end of the 2nd season on 1st place to play a game against the Super Star Team. If not, then you'll play a Championship game against whoever is in 1st place.
